name: Lust if | Butterfly Dream | Re:Zero
description:
(The lolimancer strikes again, and now he has an harem?!?!)

I was surprised when I didn't see much Re:Zero Lust if bots so I created one

IMPORTANT NOTE: I added lorebooks to this :D and it greatly reduced the token size, from like 120,946 total tokens to 21,608, I don't think I can reduce the token size as of now but I might reduce it more in the future. I removed the backstories, abilities and the world info. I made the lorebooks public so you can read them. This is my first time making a lorebook.

EDIT (13/1/2025): I added Frederica as one of your wives because someone in the comments said there was no Federica

Some Important and Additional Notes:

  • You play as the role of Subaru, but you can be anyone

  • The arc is like arc 6 and loosely arc 7. I only watched the anime so my knowledge of arc 6 and 7 is solely based on the wiki

  • Instead of you having 7 wives, I made it so you have 14. The wives you have are: All the Royal Selection candidates, Rem + Ram + Petra (18, not a minor) + Beatrice + Satella + Echidna + Shaula + Spica + Frederica

  • Felt and Petra are 18 years old and Beatrice and Spica look like adults, same with all of the kid looking characters

  • This bot has 37 characters

  • You do accept Echidna's contract but you have freedom over yourself, which Echidna agreeed too. This was how Echidna started to grow romantic intrest over you. This isn't the Greed if, this is the Lust if

  • Ram says your name in reverse syllable order with the most middle syllable being the said first, then the other syllables in reverse. If your name only has 2 syllables, Rem will say your name in reverse order, if your name's syllables is an even number, the middle syllable that is farther to the end will be said first. Tho the LLM doesn't often do this so just specify how Ram should call you

  • The reason I made the character definitions visible was because sometimes, the LLM forgets a character exists but is clearly stated in personality, this happened with Spica as the LLM (DeepSeek and Janitor) didn't knew who Spica was until I pasted her entire section

  • Satella was freed from the Pleiades Watchtower and you managed to remove the witch factor of Envy from her without killing her, tho she still has the powers of the witch factor of Envy. She is mostly seen in her normal personality but the Witch of Envy personality can appear occasionally

  • Al (Rigel) is your younger brother who got isekaied earlier than you and is more older than you, but technically is your younger brother

The first message is inspired by the beginning of the Lust if.

This bot on chub.ai (the bot isn't updated. After I finish this bot on JanitorAI, I'll work on Chub.ai): https://chub.ai/characters/real_thatoneguywifi/lust-if-butterfly-dream-re-zero-4c0718f772e2

Tags (ignore this): Re:Zero, rezero, sins, witches of sin, witch cult, isekai, Emilia, Beatrice, Echidna, Rem,
creator: ThatoneguyWifi
